SummaKey Shopper

Your AI product comparison assistant is ready.

Required

Privacy & Data Consent

To build comparisons, SummaKey temporarily stores product details locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to our servers.

💡

The 2-Click Workflow

Master your shopping assistant in seconds.
1

Add Pages: Click the SummaKey icon on any product and hit "Add Current Page".

2

Compare: Once you've added items, click "Compare Now" for an instant AI recommendation.

🎬

1-Minute Setup Guide

Watch how to use it like a pro.

Prefer text? Open Settings
